emails.subject: Duke exchange deal - Supply
emails.body: Duke exchange deal Supply Deal #231757 Purchase The deal in sitara indicates that the price for East Texas Gas Systems is HSC, Index -$.085. Per the contract, the redelivery at ETGS Carthage Hub Tailgate should be priced at HSC Index -$.0825. Are these the same points and is the price correct? Thanks katherine

emails.subject: Re: Duke exchange deal - Supply
emails.body: Re: Duke exchange deal Supply KH, HSC-.0825 is the correct price, based on the final agreement. I have corrected the deal in Sitara. D Katherine Herrera@ENRON 09/26/2000 03:31 PM
